actual_manual_intervention_hours_per_wee.rationale: Base centered at the 2 hr/week commitment per the actual-vs-commitment default. Upside anchored on Issue 2 (10% material variance plus Risk-5 grading-protocol variance combine to roughly double exception-handling time); 4.5 captures the breach-plus-variance case without speculating beyond cited drivers.

actual_total_project_cost_usd.rationale: Base centered at the $500K committed ceiling per the actual-vs-commitment default — the Builder envelope is sized to be spent. Low anchored on the plan's stated $300K minimum; upside captures Risk-3 $20–50K overrun plus Issue-1 15% spare-parts buffer ($25K on hardware CAPEX).

actual_opc_ua_bid_usd.rationale: Base centered at the $50K plan assumption for OPC UA middleware per the actual-vs-commitment default (the source-stated committed value). Upside reaches past the $75K trigger to capture wire-bender protocol-complexity premium named in Issue 2.

actual_api_p99_latency_ms.rationale: Plan budgets on-premise edge compute for low-latency control; no source-named baseline value so this is assumption. Base 70 ms is typical edge-PLC OPC UA round-trip; upper 180 ms captures Risk-4 local-server cloud-failover scenario named in the diverse-risk register.

actual_onsite_expert_cost_usd.rationale: Base centered at the $15K Issue-3 named baseline rate per the actual-vs-commitment default. Upside reaches past the $25K cap to capture the Risk-2 obscure-protocol mobilization-premium scenario; low captures the case where a local specialist underbids.
